title: Product Manager / Senior Product Manager
description:
Job Summary

Product Manager / Sr Product Manager - defines product vision, strategy, and roadmap, execution. Ensures our product portfolio meets and evolves with customer needs andbusiness goals. He / she acts as a bridge between various teams such as operations, kitchen team, marketing, and other business teams to ensure seamless collaboration and execution in F&B product changes to fit business needs.  

Key Responsibilities

  • Drive product innovation and business-planning processes with cross-functional teams. Lead continuous product innovation for core and LTO products, from pilot tests to system-wide roll out.
  • Drive the execution of all processes in the product lifecycle, including product and market research, competitor analysis, planning, positioning, requirements and roadmap development, and product launch
  • Lead product launches – plan and execute product launches, work with marketing and sales teams to ensure successful product adoption and GTM communications
  • Translate product strategy into detailed requirements for prototyping and final development with R&D and operations team
  • Assist to create product strategy documents that describe business cases, high-level use cases, technical requirements, revenue, and ROI forecasts
  • Analyze customer needs, current market trends, and potential new product initiatives with detail analysis based on customer research, ROI analysis, operational needs / capabilities.
  • Assess current competitor offerings and seek opportunities for differentiation against business mission, operational needs / capabilities.
  • Analyze product performance data, gather customer feedback, utilize data and insights to inform product decisions and improvements. 

Required skills and qualifications

  • Experience working in a dynamic and entrepreneurial product management role
  • Proven success in overseeing all elements of the product development lifecycle
  • High effectiveness in collaborating with cross-functional teams
  • Experience in delivering pilots to fine tune products / marketing strategies
  • Ability to analyze data, understand market trends, and make data-driven decisions. 
  • Ability to understand the evolving landscape of Chinese cuisine, define a clear product vision and strategy, aligning it with business goals. 
  • Ability to solve problems that arise during the product development lifecycle. 

Preferred experience:

  • Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent) in product design / marketing / business management
  • Experience working in FMCG / consumer brands / F&B in product development

postedCompany.name: TIM HO WAN INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
